cc:Work.dc:title: Box - TwoPiece
cc:Work.dc:description:
A two piece box where top slips over the bottom half to form the enclosure.
Set *hi* larger than *h* to leave gap between the inner and outer shell. This can be used to make opening the box easier. Set *hi* smaller to only have a small inner ridge that will allow the content to be more visible after opening.
![Bottom view](static/samples/TwoPiece2.jpg)
Created with Boxes.py (https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/) Command line: boxes TwoPiece --FingerJoint_style=rectangular --FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0 --FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0 --FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0 --FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0 --FingerJoint_finger=2.0 --FingerJoint_play=0.0 --FingerJoint_space=2.0 --FingerJoint_width=1.0 --x=35 --y=35 --h=125 --hi=0.0 --outside=0 --play=0.15 --thickness=3.0 --burn=0.1 --format=svg --labels=0 --labels=1 --reference=100.0 --tabs=0.0 --qr_code=0 --inner_corners=loop --spacing=0.5 --debug=0 Command line short: boxes TwoPiece --x=35 --y=35 --h=125 --outside=0 --spacing=0.5 Url: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/TwoPiece?FingerJoint_style=rectangular&FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0&FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0&FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0&FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0&FingerJoint_finger=2.0&FingerJoint_play=0.0&FingerJoint_space=2.0&FingerJoint_width=1.0&x=35&y=35&h=125&hi=0.0&outside=0&play=0.15&thickness=3.0&burn=0.1&format=svg&labels=0&labels=1&reference=100.0&tabs=0.0&qr_code=0&inner_corners=loop&spacing=0.5&debug=0&language=en&render=1 Url short: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/TwoPiece?x=35&y=35&h=125&outside=0&spacing=0.5 SettingsUrl: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/TwoPiece?FingerJoint_style=rectangular&FingerJoint_surroundingspaces=2.0&FingerJoint_bottom_lip=0.0&FingerJoint_edge_width=1.0&FingerJoint_extra_length=0.0&FingerJoint_finger=2.0&FingerJoint_play=0.0&FingerJoint_space=2.0&FingerJoint_width=1.0&x=35&y=35&h=125&hi=0.0&outside=0&play=0.15&thickness=3.0&burn=0.1&format=svg&labels=0&labels=1&reference=100.0&tabs=0.0&qr_code=0&inner_corners=loop&spacing=0.5&debug=0&language=en SettingsUrl short: https://boxes.hackerspace-bamberg.de/TwoPiece?x=35&y=35&h=125&outside=0&spacing=0.5
